ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial year (e.g., 2014-15, 2015-16) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Operating cash flow surplus to revenue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., %) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the data belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric the data belongs to */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the financial metric */,
  "revised_value" REAL /* Revised value of the financial metric */,
  "estimated_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the financial metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, department head, executive) */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of forecasting model (e.g., regression, time series) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was generated */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the metric */,
  "forecasted_value" REAL /* Forecasted value of the metric */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments_revenue" (
  "dept_revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department revenue record */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the department */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_revenue_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_revenue_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_revenue" (
  "region_revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region revenue record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the region */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_revenue_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_revenue_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., salaries, rent) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
